storyboard.title: Hackathon Hustle
storyboard.summary: A day spent diving into a hackathon — from a morning strategy meeting to building a demo and granting access to a freshly coded agent.

scenes.description: Early morning, soft golden light streaming through a window. A young person sits at a clean desk with a laptop open, a steaming cup of coffee beside them. They're on a video call, gesturing animatedly at the screen where a colleague's face is visible in a small tile. Sticky notes and a notebook are scattered nearby. The mood is focused and collaborative.

Midday, the energy shifts. The same person is now hunched forward intensely over their laptop in a dimly lit room with multiple browser tabs and a code editor glowing on screen. Their fingers fly across the keyboard. Empty snack wrappers and an energy drink sit beside the laptop. A chat notification pops up on the corner of the screen. The atmosphere is fast-paced and driven — classic hackathon grind mode.

Late afternoon. Close-up of the laptop screen showing a Google security permissions dialog — the person clicks 'Allow' confidently, authorizing an app integration. The camera pulls back to reveal them smiling slightly, nodding to themselves with a sense of progress. Warm ambient light mixes with the cool glow of the monitor.

Evening. The person leans back in their chair, arms stretched overhead in triumph. On the laptop screen, a demo video file is open and ready to play. They hit the play button and a colorful preview flickers to life on screen. The room is dark except for the monitor's glow and a small desk lamp. A satisfied grin spreads across their face — the hackathon project is coming together.
